sections.heading: Preamble
sections.text:
"
Appropriation 2004 [No. 7 of 2004 35
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 7 of 2004
Date ofA ssent: 15th April, 2004
An Act to authorise expenditure from the general revenues
of the Republic of moneys required for the services of
the Republic during the financial year ending on the 31st
Dect;mber, 2004, not exceeding In the aggregate eight
trillion, three hundred and twenty-eight billion, five
hundred and ninety-four million, four hundred and thirty­
three thousand and sixty-five kwacba.
[20th April, 2004
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia. Enactment
1, This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 2004. Short Title
2. (I) On the authority of a warrant issued by:the President, Appropriation
there may be expended from the general revenues of the Republic,
such moneys, not exceeding in the aggregate eight trillion, three
hundred and twenty- eight billion, five·hundreil and ninety-four
million, four hundred and thirty-three thousand ahd sixty-five
kwacha, as may be required for the services o.fthe Republic during
the financial year ending on the 31st December, 2004.
(2) The moneys referred to in subsection (I) shall be appropriated
' '
to the services of the Republic specified in the Second Column of
the Schedule in amounts not exceeding the amounts indicated in
the Third Column of the Schedule.
(3) On the written authority of the Secretary to the Treasury,
Ministry of Finance and National Planning, the amounts shown
under the sub-heads of estimates may be varied:
Provided that-
. (a) the amounts appropriated to each Head shall not thereby
be altered; and
(b) any of the amounts shown under Head 20/01 or 21/01
shall not be varied.
